pages.notes: Renders; job-openings, candidates, interviews, notifications OPTIONS+GET 200/pending
Renders; job-openings, departments/active, employees, notifications all OPTIONS 200 with pending GETs
ApiClient error logged on navigate: GET /employees 403. HR_ADMIN lacks employees.read indirect grant on this page. Surfaced via console only; page UI may still render.
Three 403s. HR_ADMIN missing RECRUITMENT_CANDIDATE:READ and LETTERS:READ grants; pipeline board degraded.
Page renders interviews list (200) but candidates fetch 403s — interviewer cannot expand candidate context.
Page shell loaded (page.js+error.js+loading.js chunks) but <main> region rendered empty. No API calls observed. Likely empty-state or missing onboarding dashboard component.

flows.name: Hire-to-Retire step 1 — open /recruitment/jobs/new
flows.notes: Route returns 404 Page Not Found. Cannot begin job creation flow from this path.

flows.name: Hire-to-Retire step 2 — /recruitment/candidates list renders
flows.notes: Page route loads but candidate data cannot be fetched (403 from backend); see /recruitment/candidates.

bugs.title: /recruitment/jobs/new returns 404 Page Not Found
bugs.evidence: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/recruitment/jobs/new -> 404 page with no job creation form; only back/dashboard links present
bugs.impact: HR_ADMIN cannot create new job openings via direct URL. Breaks S1 Hire-to-Retire flow step 1.

bugs.title: HR_ADMIN gets 403 on GET /api/v1/recruitment/candidates from pipeline/interviews pages
bugs.evidence: Console: [ApiClient] Error: GET /recruitment/candidates 403 — on both /recruitment/pipeline and /recruitment/interviews
bugs.impact: Pipeline board cannot load candidates column; interviewers cannot see candidate metadata. RBAC gap for HR_ADMIN permission set.

bugs.title: HR_ADMIN gets 403 on GET /api/v1/employees from recruitment pages
bugs.evidence: Console logs on /recruitment/candidates and /recruitment/pipeline: [ApiClient] Error: GET /employees 403
bugs.impact: Employee autocomplete/assignment (hiring managers, interviewer picker) broken on recruitment workflows. HR_ADMIN should have employee:read.

bugs.title: HR_ADMIN gets 403 on GET /api/v1/letters/templates/active on /recruitment/pipeline
bugs.impact: Offer letter template dropdown unavailable in pipeline; cannot issue offers from this view.

bugs.title: /onboarding renders empty <main> region
bugs.evidence: find tool reports main region empty; only breadcrumb and chrome visible; no API calls observed
bugs.impact: Either empty-state missing, data loading silently fails, or onboarding landing page not implemented for HR_ADMIN. Needs design/implementation verification.
